en_title: Marvel's Wolverine: The Big Interview With Insomniac on Sony's 'Unapologetically Violent' PS5 Exclusive
cn_title: 《索尼》《漫威金刚狼》暴力无上限：Insomniac详解PS5独占
subtitle: 金刚狼的愤怒
opus_summary: Insomniac Games在State of Play上展示了《漫威金刚狼》实机画面，创意总监Marcus Smith和游戏总监Mike Daly接受IGN专访，详解游戏暴力程度、愤怒机制、治疗因子及断肢系统。游戏为M级，但提供关闭血腥的辅助功能。愤怒值影响连招威力与治疗爆发，心脏停跳即死亡。战斗非开放世界，而是线性单机冒险，包含与琴·葛蕾的合作终结技以及与剑齿虎的竞争性联手。

paragraphs.en: You’ve no doubt seen the Marvel’s Wolverine gameplay footage fresh from Sony’s State of Play showcase and have questions. I did too! As a big Wolverine fan, I wanted to know more about how the game will actually play once it comes out exclusively on PlayStation 5 later this year, from the extent of the violence to co-op finishers with Jean Grey. How does Wolverine’s Rage meter work? Is that actually real-time healing? And what is the size and scope of the game itself?
paragraphs.cn: 你肯定已经看过索尼State of Play发布会上《漫威金刚狼》的实机演示了，心里肯定有不少疑问。我也是！作为金刚狼的铁杆粉丝，我想知道更多关于这款游戏的实际玩法——从暴力程度到与琴·葛蕾的合作终结技。愤怒值系统怎么运作？那真的是实时治疗吗？游戏本身的规模和范围又如何？

paragraphs.en: After a pre-screening of the trailer ahead of State of Play, I got the chance to chat with creative director Marcus Smith and game director Mike Daly to find out everything I could about Marvel’s Wolverine in the space of 30 minutes. And yes, I asked if you could give the middle claw.
paragraphs.cn: 在State of Play之前，我提前观看了预告片，并有机会与创意总监Marcus Smith和游戏总监Mike Daly聊了30分钟，尽可能多地了解《漫威金刚狼》的信息。没错，我问了能不能竖中指。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what PlayStation has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解PlayStation在2026年6月State of Play上公布的所有内容，可以查看这里。

paragraphs.en: IGN: The level of gore and blood is extreme, which as a Wolverine fan is fantastic. But was there ever any question over the violence, because we have seen family friendly versions of Wolverine before with a different audience in mind. It would be great to get some insight into the decision to say, we’re going to go for it, this is an M for Mature game.
paragraphs.cn: IGN：血腥程度非常高，作为金刚狼粉丝这很棒。但之前也有面向不同受众的家庭友好版金刚狼，你们在决定「我们就要这么做，这是M级成人游戏」时，有没有过任何犹豫？

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: From the inception of the project, we knew that the number one most important thing was to bring the Wolverine fantasy to life. Not just that, but make it the ultimate Wolverine fantasy. And when you look at the aspects of the character and all the stories he's been through in his history, it was clear that violence was a key part of that. So that was never really in question, and it was kind of baked into how we made decisions from the very beginning. So we knew that we were going to have to bring that out in gameplay, put it in your hands as a player, make it a part of the story.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：从项目一开始，我们就知道最重要的目标是把金刚狼的幻想变为现实。不仅仅是实现，而是要打造终极的金刚狼幻想。当你审视这个角色的方方面面以及他经历过的所有故事时，很明显暴力是其核心部分。所以这一点从未有过疑问，从一开始就融入了我们的决策方式。我们知道必须在游戏中展现这一点，把它交到玩家手中，让它成为故事的一部分。

paragraphs.en: But at the same time, Insomniac Games, we want to have a grounded world with believable things that happen. So we didn't want to go over the top. We really wanted to hit the bullseye on what is the best representation of Wolverine, what delivers fan expectations, and what's going to keep the claw combat action satisfying over the whole course of the playthrough.
paragraphs.cn: 但与此同时，Insomniac Games希望打造一个真实可信的世界。所以我们不想做得太过火。我们真正想要的是精准命中金刚狼的最佳呈现，满足粉丝的期待，并让爪击战斗在整个游戏过程中始终保持爽快感。

paragraphs.en: So those are the things we calibrated against. You can see the results for yourself because we've put it in the trailer. The way I would describe it is that we were unapologetically violent. We knew it would have to accomplish that in order to accomplish our ultimate mission. And because of that, the gameplay retains satisfaction.
paragraphs.cn: 这就是我们校准的标准。你可以从预告片中看到结果。我会形容它是「毫无歉意地暴力」。我们知道必须做到这一点才能完成终极使命。正因如此，游戏玩法保持了爽快感。

paragraphs.en: Now all that being said, we know that it's not for everyone. And because we knew this was going to be a big part of the game from the beginning, we also implemented an accessibility feature to turn off gore. It's clearly integrated into the game in a lot of different ways, and so it's a nuanced feature that is very selective about what we show, what we censor, turning off blood and things like that, just in order to make it more palatable to people who don't really want to have that part of the experience.
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，我们也知道这并不适合所有人。正因为从一开始就知道这将是游戏的重要组成部分，我们还加入了一个关闭血腥的辅助功能。这个功能以多种方式融入游戏，非常细致，会选择性显示或屏蔽内容，关闭血液等效果，让不想体验这部分内容的玩家也能接受。

paragraphs.en: Marcus Smith: I would just add one more thing that was a deciding factor in this, which is the relentlessness of the character himself. It's such a true, core element of Logan that what makes him so heroic is that he feels everything along the way and he keeps going. And so we couldn't show that without showing damage, without showing that violence and everything on him as well. So it wasn't just he’s going to inflict a lot of damage because he's got these razor sharp, unbreakable claws. Obviously that's true, but it's also part of the core essence of the character we're trying to show.
paragraphs.cn: Marcus Smith：我想补充一个决定性因素，那就是角色本身的坚韧不拔。这是Logan真实的核心特质——他之所以如此英勇，是因为他一路感受一切，却依然继续前行。如果不展现伤害、暴力和他身上的伤痕，我们就无法表现这一点。所以这不仅仅是因为他有锋利的、坚不可摧的爪子而能造成大量伤害。显然那是对的，但这也是我们试图展现的角色核心本质的一部分。

paragraphs.en: IGN: We’ve seen dismemberment in cutscenes, but is there dismemberment in the actual gameplay combat when you're in control, when you're actually pushing buttons, doing combos? Can you cut off someone's arm, their leg? Can you chop off someone's head? I appreciate I sound like a maniac asking this question, but I want to know!
paragraphs.cn: IGN：我们在过场动画中看到了断肢，但在实际游戏战斗中，当你控制角色、按键连招时，也会有断肢吗？能砍掉敌人的胳膊、腿吗？能砍掉头吗？我知道问这个问题听起来像个疯子，但我想知道！

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: I mean, you're spot on. We wanted to deliver it in gameplay as well as in cinematics and be consistent in that way. So to the point of not going over the top, it's not like limbs are cartoonishly flying everywhere, but when you do an especially brutal move against an enemy that you've broken down their defenses on, some of the times you can chop off their limbs or do even more violent things to them. So that is part of Logan's combat moveset.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：你说得没错。我们希望在游戏玩法和过场动画中都能呈现断肢效果，并保持一致。至于不过火，并不是说肢体像卡通片一样到处乱飞，但当你对防御被瓦解的敌人使出特别残暴的招式时，有时可以砍掉他们的肢体，或者做出更暴力的事情。这是Logan战斗招式的一部分。

paragraphs.en: Marcus Smith: The trick for us with the violence was, it doesn't come off gratuitous in the sense that Logan enjoys it, right? It's really an expediency. He's just very efficient, and that might happen during the efficiency of his combat.
paragraphs.cn: Marcus Smith：我们对暴力的处理技巧在于，它不能显得毫无意义，好像Logan乐在其中，对吧？这其实是一种权宜之计。他只是非常高效，在高效战斗的过程中可能会发生这种事。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Also in the combat we see what looks like a rage system. There are some meters that you can build up and then you can do something that makes Wolverine go feral. It would be great to get a breakdown of how that works and what you have to do to build that up.
paragraphs.cn: IGN：在战斗中我们还看到了一个类似愤怒值的系统。有一些计量条可以积攒，然后你可以做一些事情让金刚狼进入狂野状态。能详细解释一下这个系统如何运作，以及如何积攒愤怒值吗？

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: Yeah, for sure. We knew we needed to represent Logan's rage in combat as a major element of the character. The way that works, the parts of it you see in the gameplay trailer, is when you're engaged in combat, all the moves that you do build up a little bit of rage. Getting kills gives you chunks of rage. And there are some special moves you can do, like the particularly brutal ones, like barraging an enemy who's already opened up, that can build it up even further. So there are ways to build up your rage, and it sort of represents the battle momentum between the enemies and Wolverine.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：当然。我们知道需要在战斗中把Logan的愤怒作为角色的主要元素来呈现。它的运作方式——你在实机预告片中看到的部分——是当你投入战斗时，你做的所有招式都会积累少量愤怒值。击杀敌人会获得大量愤怒值。还有一些特殊招式，比如特别残暴的连击，对已经破防的敌人进行猛攻，可以进一步积攒愤怒值。所以有多种方式积攒愤怒值，它某种程度上代表了敌我之间的战斗势头。

paragraphs.en: It comes into play in a few major ways where, as you get towards the middle of the meter, your combos become more powerful. And so, you have an incentive to play more aggressively, because in addition to doing damage faster, the rage starts to decay a little bit. If you work through that and build it up towards the top of the meter, then... you saw him go into this aggressive, really feral tier of rage where he can get kills really quick. He's able to do moves called Critical Strikes, where he just impales enemies with real brute force to take them out quickly. But at that level, his rage also drains very quickly. So there's a strategic aspect of choosing your targets, not worrying about defense, and being as aggressive as possible in order to sustain it and get as many enemies as you can before it runs out.
paragraphs.cn: 愤怒值在几个主要方面发挥作用：当它达到计量条中间时，你的连招会变得更强大。因此，你有动力打得更激进，因为除了更快造成伤害外，愤怒值还会开始缓慢衰减。如果你继续积攒，把它推到计量条顶端，那么……你看到他会进入一个极具攻击性的狂野愤怒层级，能非常快速地击杀敌人。他可以使用名为「暴击」的招式，用蛮力直接刺穿敌人，迅速解决战斗。但在这个层级，愤怒值也会快速消耗。所以这涉及策略性：选择目标，不必担心防御，尽可能激进地维持愤怒值，在它耗尽前尽可能多地消灭敌人。

paragraphs.en: Now rage is also tied to another essential sort of Logan element of combat, which is his healing factor. When all of Logan's body energy is dedicated to fighting in combat, his healing factor is relatively slow, passively. And our Logan, if he takes enough damage, his healing factor is overloaded, his heart can stop, and that ends his healing. He will die. But if you have enough rage, the adrenaline surge can jumpstart your healing factor and let you do a Healing Surge to get back into battle.
paragraphs.cn: 愤怒值还与Logan战斗的另一个核心要素——治疗因子——相关联。当Logan的全部体能都投入战斗时，他的治疗因子会相对缓慢地被动运作。在我们的游戏中，如果Logan受到足够多的伤害，治疗因子会过载，他的心脏可能停跳，从而终止治疗，他就会死亡。但如果你有足够的愤怒值，肾上腺素激增可以重新激活治疗因子，让你使用「治疗爆发」重返战斗。

paragraphs.en: So that's another element that changes the dynamic of combat depending on how much rage you have. At one end of the spectrum, you don't have enough rage to jumpstart your heart and so you're vulnerable. You need to be strategic, you need to be defensive, you need to focus on survival and rage build-up. And then at the opposite end of the spectrum, you need to be super aggressive. You need to focus on doing damage as quick as you can and focusing on the targets that you can kill quickly.
paragraphs.cn: 这是另一个根据愤怒值多少改变战斗动态的元素。在一种极端情况下，你没有足够的愤怒值来重启心脏，因此很脆弱。你需要讲究策略，注重防御，专注于生存和积攒愤怒值。而在另一个极端，你需要超级激进，专注于尽快造成伤害，并瞄准能快速击杀的目标。

paragraphs.en: IGN: You say that the way that Wolverine dies in the game is his heart will stop. Fans have debated this for years: how do you actually kill Wolverine? Can he be killed? Even if you chop his head off, can he just grow back? Did you have to think about all of these nitty gritty Wolverine-type things that comic book fans have talked about for years?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：你说金刚狼在游戏中的死亡方式是心脏停跳。粉丝们多年来一直在争论：到底怎么才能杀死金刚狼？他能被杀吗？就算砍掉他的头，他也能重新长出来吗？你们是否必须考虑这些漫画迷多年来讨论的、关于金刚狼的细枝末节？

paragraphs.en: Marcus Smith: If you split him down the middle, can you get two Wolverines?
paragraphs.cn: Marcus Smith：如果把他从中间劈开，会不会得到两个金刚狼？

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: But yeah, the serious answer to your question is like, yeah, we think about that! Everybody knows this character to some degree, so early on in development, these questions came up all the time. How can we accurately represent this character when some people see him as truly, literally immortal? And everybody has kind of a different take. I think we have the benefit that his healing factor has taken many different forms over the many different media that he's encountered. And so we had a little bit of leeway to find the best fit for this video game that still was true to the character. And this is the one that we ended up on because basically it makes the game fun, while still giving you a chance to witness this insane regeneration factor up close.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：但说正经的，答案是：是的，我们考虑过！每个人对这个角色都有一定了解，所以在开发早期，这些问题经常出现。当有些人认为他真正意义上永生不死时，我们如何准确呈现这个角色？而且每个人的看法都不同。我认为我们的优势在于，他的治疗因子在不同媒体中有过多种不同表现形式。所以我们有一定的自由度，来找到最适合这款游戏、同时又忠于角色的方案。我们最终选择了这个方案，因为它基本上让游戏变得有趣，同时还能让你近距离目睹这种疯狂的再生能力。

paragraphs.en: IGN: We see in the footage that Wolverine suffers actual damage to his body as you're playing the game, as you're in combat. To what extent is this real-time damage he suffers? And does that factor into gameplay in any way? Is that a visual cue that you use as well as the meters that you have to manage, or simply a graphical effect?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：我们在演示中看到，在游戏过程中，金刚狼的身体会遭受实际伤害。这种实时伤害的程度如何？它是否以某种方式影响游戏玩法？它是与需要管理的计量条一起使用的视觉提示，还是仅仅是一种图形效果？

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: It was really important to us that you saw the damage, that you felt the damage, that you could tell Wolverine was in pain and he was hurting for all these things that were happening to him. The damage on his body reflects what his health is currently at. So you can sort of see it heal in real-time as he does his Healing Surges or his Last Stand, or he’ll heal rapidly once you complete a combat and he can focus all his energy on regeneration. And I can say a lot of work was put into building Logan's body in a way that can take lots of different types of damage all over and at a level of fidelity that holds up to our close, visceral camera.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：对我们来说，让玩家看到伤害、感受到伤害、能看出金刚狼正在承受痛苦，这非常重要。他身上的伤害反映了他当前的生命值。所以你可以看到他使用「治疗爆发」或「背水一战」时实时愈合，或者一旦你完成战斗，他就能集中所有能量进行再生，快速愈合。可以说，我们在构建Logan的身体上投入了大量工作，使其能够承受全身多种不同类型的伤害，并且细节精度足以匹配我们近距离、有冲击力的镜头。

paragraphs.en: IGN: There's another bit in the gameplay footage where he takes a real beating from a big enemy and you have this sequence where you have to hammer the Square button to heal. That looked different to me than the normal pace of combat where you're managing his health as you're playing as you've been describing. Is that a scripted moment in the game where you will have these sections where you just have to pass through it, or is it more dynamic than that? How exactly does that work?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：在实机演示中还有一段，他被一个大敌人狠狠揍了一顿，然后出现了一个需要猛按方块键来治疗的环节。这看起来和你之前描述的常规战斗中管理生命值的节奏不太一样。这是游戏中的脚本化时刻，会有这种必须通过的环节，还是说它更具动态性？具体是怎么运作的？

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: The way that works is, you've got your health bar, once it gets drained out, if you've got enough rage left, then Logan's down but he's not out. It's during those moments that you use that button mash sequence to convert your latent adrenaline back into health. So you get a second chance. You can come back, but you're all out of rage so you do not get another one. And how well you do at that sequence determines how much health you come out of the moment with. This can happen lots of different ways, basically just however the enemy takes you down.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：它的运作方式是：你有生命值条，一旦耗尽，如果你还有足够的愤怒值，Logan就会倒地但并未出局。正是在这些时刻，你需要通过猛按按键的环节，将潜在的肾上腺素转化为生命值。这样你就获得了一次机会。你可以重新站起来，但愤怒值会全部耗尽，所以不会有第二次机会。你在那个环节的表现决定了你能恢复多少生命值。这种情况可以以多种方式触发，基本上取决于敌人如何击倒你。

paragraphs.en: IGN: It would be great to talk about the style of gameplay that's on offer and the size and scope of the game. This is obviously very different to Spider-Man. This isn't an explore an open world type of game. The footage I've seen, you have a decent size play space and there's an element of where do I go and how do I do this? And then it expands from there and moves into another section where it's a convoy chase. Is that typical of the entire game experience, or is that a one-off type gameplay experience just for that mission?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：我们来谈谈游戏玩法的风格以及游戏的规模和范围。这显然与《蜘蛛侠》非常不同。这不是一款探索开放世界的游戏。从我看过的演示来看，游戏空间规模适中，包含「我去哪里？我该怎么做？」的元素。然后场景扩展，进入另一个部分，比如追逐车队。这是整个游戏体验的典型模式，还是仅为那个任务设计的独特玩法？

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: So again, going back to the beginning when we asked ourselves, how do we make the best Wolverine game possible that represents that character? We thought about, Logan's a character who basically travels the world, has traveled the world many times over. He's pulled by a search for his past. He's pushed by a sense of duty. And to that end, we decided that a globe-hopping adventure was the right take for this game. Logan is not a character that's anchored in a particular place and spends a lot of time on it.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：再次回到最初的问题：我们如何制作一款最能代表这个角色的最佳金刚狼游戏？我们考虑到，Logan基本上是一个周游世界的角色，已经多次环游世界。他被寻找过去的渴望所牵引，被责任感所推动。因此，我们决定环球冒险是这款游戏的正确方向。Logan不是一个固定在某处并长期停留的角色。

paragraphs.en: So what you can expect out of the game is that we've created a comic book-style pacing, dense story, that's like a rollercoaster and it grips you from beginning to end. And generally speaking, you're driven through all of these missions by important events and plot points that are happening. So in that sense, what you saw in the gameplay trailer was kind of representative. Logan's got a lead, he's got a direction, but he has agency in how he decides to approach it. The areas have different paths you could take. Stealth is optional; you could do it or you could not do it, you could jump straight into combat. And you can poke your nose around the nooks and crannies of the world to find things here and there, and some optional content and collectibles along the way.
paragraphs.cn: 所以你可以期待的是，我们创造了漫画式的节奏、紧凑的故事，就像过山车一样，从头到尾扣人心弦。总的来说，你被重要事件和剧情节点驱动着完成所有任务。从这个意义上说，你在实机预告片中看到的内容具有代表性。Logan有线索、有方向，但他有自主权决定如何行动。区域内有不同的路径可供选择。潜行是可选的；你可以潜行，也可以不潜行，直接跳入战斗。你还可以在世界各处探索，发现各种东西，以及一些可选内容和收集品。

paragraphs.en: We sought to have a large amount of variety in the feel of the different environments that you go to. And so that changes the pacing and the shape of how you navigate space and how you explore. And that leads to different flavors of gameplay as well, where some are more about observation and traversal, some are more about finding characters to interact with, and a lot of them are about stalking enemies and taking them out.
paragraphs.cn: 我们力求让不同环境的感觉具有丰富多样性。这会改变节奏以及你探索空间的方式。这也带来了不同风味的玩法，有些更注重观察和移动，有些更注重寻找可互动的角色，而很多则涉及追踪并消灭敌人。

paragraphs.en: IGN: There's a moment in the footage where Wolverine can see the area that he's about to enter into, see enemies moving about, and then leaps into action. But that isn't necessarily a big sandbox area where there's lots of different things going on and you can make lots of different choices about how you're going about it. Would you say that's a fair assessment?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：在演示中有一个时刻，金刚狼可以看到他即将进入的区域，看到敌人移动，然后跃入行动。但这并不一定是一个大型沙盒区域，有很多不同的事情发生，你可以做出很多不同的选择。你觉得这个评价公平吗？

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: Yeah. I can say we did not set out to make an open world game or a sandbox game. What we really wanted was high octane, high intrigue, linear single-player adventure, and the missions reflect that in their structure.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：是的。可以说我们并没有打算做一款开放世界或沙盒游戏。我们真正想要的是高能、高悬念的线性单人冒险，任务结构也反映了这一点。

paragraphs.en: IGN: At one point in the gameplay Jean Grey turns up, which is very exciting. You fight alongside her, and there are co-op combat elements. I noticed what looked like co-op finishers where you can set enemies up for each other. How does that work exactly? Is this a major element in the game? Will we see this with lots of different characters, or is Jean Grey a one-off?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：在演示中，琴·葛蕾出现了，这非常令人兴奋。你和她并肩作战，还有合作战斗元素。我注意到看起来像是合作终结技，你们可以互相为对方创造击杀机会。这具体是怎么运作的？这是游戏的主要元素吗？我们会看到很多不同的角色有这种合作，还是琴·葛蕾只是特例？

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: When Logan meets up with Jean Grey in the trailer that you saw, they have a common enemy, they naturally work together, and they kind of have to feel this out. Jean Grey is sort of her own hero. She can hold her own and she operates autonomously. So she'll defend herself, she'll fight enemies, she'll take them out. And when the two of you are close to each other, you'll work together to take out enemies. One of the elements of this that you saw is that Jean can open enemies up to Logan so that it's on the player to listen to Jean, pay attention to her, and see these opportunities for quicker kills. So there is an interactive element to that. They will work together more later on in the game, and Jean can use her telepathy to help Logan in stealth segments as well to give him an edge by dimming enemy perceptions.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：当Logan在预告片中与琴·葛蕾相遇时，他们有共同的敌人，自然就合作了，而且他们需要摸索配合。琴·葛蕾本身就是一个英雄。她能自保，自主行动。她会自卫、战斗、消灭敌人。当你们两人靠近时，会合作消灭敌人。你看到的一个元素是，琴可以为Logan创造机会，让敌人露出破绽，玩家需要倾听琴的提示，留意她，抓住快速击杀的机会。所以这其中有互动元素。他们在游戏后期会有更多合作，琴还可以在潜行环节使用心灵感应帮助Logan，通过削弱敌人的感知来给他优势。

paragraphs.en: There are also other allies you fight alongside. We revealed Sabretooth at the end here. In this game, Logan and Sabretooth are actually on a team together, but the way they ally is not really anything like the way you ally with Jean Gray. Logan and Sabretooth have a very competitive dynamic between them. Whereas Jean Gray might give you an opportunity to get a kill, with Sabretooth fighting alongside you, it's more like, you think you've got a kill and he rushes in to steal it from you, and their combat banter brings out that dynamic and makes the whole fight more fun.
paragraphs.cn: 还有其他盟友与你并肩作战。我们在结尾揭示了剑齿虎。在这款游戏中，Logan和剑齿虎实际上是同一团队的，但他们结盟的方式与琴·葛蕾完全不同。Logan和剑齿虎之间有一种非常竞争的关系。琴·葛蕾可能会给你创造击杀机会，而剑齿虎与你并肩作战时，更像是你以为能击杀，他却冲进来抢走，他们的战斗调侃凸显了这种动态，让整个战斗更有趣。

paragraphs.en: IGN: Wolverine and Sabretooth fighting together! Who'd have thought it? Okay, that all sounds very cool. The footage we saw there starts with Wolverine stealthing, or at least doing a couple of stealth kills. But could you then go on from that and stealth kill your way through the entire combat experience in that section? Or are you eventually forced into straight-up combat? Can you stealth kill your way through the game in these sections?
paragraphs.cn: IGN：金刚狼和剑齿虎并肩作战！谁能想到呢？好吧，听起来都很酷。我们看到的那段演示以金刚狼潜行开始，或者至少做了几次潜行击杀。但你能从那里开始，用潜行击杀完成整个战斗体验吗？还是最终会被迫进入正面战斗？在这些部分，你能全程潜行击杀吗？

paragraphs.en: Mike Daly: There are a lot of scenarios in the game where it is not possible to stealth your way all the way through. But generally speaking, when the enemies are unaware of you, there are ways you can get through the whole thing with stealth. Now that being said, being a super stealthy character through and through isn't necessarily our priority for Wolverine. He uses stealth when it's the most efficient way to get the job done rather than it being important that he doesn't get caught, because he doesn't really fear combat. So the choice of stealth or combat is always in the hands of the player. In all those scenarios, he can always jump into combat whenever he wants. Not just that, but in a way there's kind of a natural encouragement towards it, because when you get stealth kills, it is a great way to pre-build your rage meter in a way that doesn't decay. And so there's a growing incentive to go ahead and make a big splash into combat because you have so much of that momentum behind you already. So we leave the choice to the player to how they want to get through the combat setup. And usually the ideal route is striking some balance of a little bit of stealth and then finding the right moment to go all out and take out the rest.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Daly：游戏中有很多场景无法全程潜行。但一般来说，当敌人没有察觉你时，你可以通过潜行完成整个部分。话虽如此，把金刚狼塑造成一个彻头彻尾的超级潜行角色并非我们的首要目标。他在潜行是最有效的方式时才会使用，而不是因为害怕被发现，因为他并不畏惧战斗。所以潜行还是战斗的选择始终掌握在玩家手中。在所有场景中，他随时都可以跳入战斗。不仅如此，某种程度上游戏还会自然鼓励你这么做，因为潜行击杀是预先积攒愤怒值的好方法，而且不会衰减。所以你会越来越有动力大张旗鼓地投入战斗，因为你已经积累了足够的势头。我们把选择权留给玩家，让他们决定如何应对战斗场景。通常理想的路线是平衡一下：先潜行，然后找到合适的时机全力出击，消灭剩下的敌人。
